languages.text: {n}Оружие в руках женщины начинает заметно подрагивать.{/n} "Если бы это произнес кто-то другой, я бы не стала слушать. Но вы... с вашими заслугами... авторитет для многих в {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуме{/g}". {n}Некоторое время она молчит, терзаемая сомнениями.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Оружие в руках женщины начинает заметно подрагивать.{/n} "Если бы это произнес кто-то другой, я бы не стала слушать. Но вы... с вашими заслугами... авторитет для многих в {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуме{/g}". {n}Некоторое время она молчит, терзаемая сомнениями.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The weapon in the woman's hands noticeably trembles.{/n} "If anyone else had said this, I wouldn't listen. But you... and your achievements... You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Waffe in der Hand der Frau zittert sichtlich.{/n} "Hätte das jemand anderes gesagt, hätte ich nicht zugehört. Aber Ihr ... und Eure Erfolge ... Ihr genießt den Respekt so vieler Leute im gesamten {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}Sie schweigt einige Zeit und versinkt in Gedanken.{/n}

You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Waffe in der Hand der Frau zittert sichtlich.{/n} "Hätte das jemand anderes gesagt, hätte ich nicht zugehört. Aber Ihr ... und Eure Erfolge ... Ihr genießt den Respekt so vieler Leute im gesamten {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}Sie schweigt einige Zeit und versinkt in Gedanken.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'arme que la femme tient entre ses mains est agitée de tremblements.{/n} « Venant de tout autre que vous, je n'en aurais pas cru un traître mot. Mais votre noblesse... et vos exploits... Tout en vous commande le respect aux quatre coins de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. »{n}Elle se tait momentanément, rongée par le doute.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The weapon in the woman's hands noticeably trembles.{/n} "If anyone else had said this, I wouldn't listen. But you... and your achievements... You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'arme que la femme tient entre ses mains est agitée de tremblements.{/n} « Venant de tout autre que vous, je n'en aurais pas cru un traître mot. Mais votre noblesse... et vos exploits... Tout en vous commande le respect aux quatre coins de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. »{n}Elle se tait momentanément, rongée par le doute.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女人手中的武器明显在抖动。{/n}“换作别人说这话，我听都不会听。但您……还有您的功绩……您在整个{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}都受人敬仰。”{n}她沉默了一阵，内心陷入了疑虑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The weapon in the woman's hands noticeably trembles.{/n} "If anyone else had said this, I wouldn't listen. But you... and your achievements... You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}女人手中的武器明显在抖动。{/n}“换作别人说这话，我听都不会听。但您……还有您的功绩……您在整个{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}都受人敬仰。”{n}她沉默了一阵，内心陷入了疑虑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El arma que la mujer lleva en la mano tiembla visiblemente.{/n} «Si eso lo hubiera dicho cualquier otro, no le habría hecho caso. Pero usted... y sus hazañas... se han ganado el respeto de gran parte del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}». {n}Guarda un prolongado silencio, consumida por las dudas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The weapon in the woman's hands noticeably trembles.{/n} "If anyone else had said this, I wouldn't listen. But you... and your achievements... You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El arma que la mujer lleva en la mano tiembla visiblemente.{/n} «Si eso lo hubiera dicho cualquier otro, no le habría hecho caso. Pero usted... y sus hazañas... se han ganado el respeto de gran parte del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}». {n}Guarda un prolongado silencio, consumida por las dudas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女性の手に握られた銃身が目に見えて震え始める。{/n}"他の誰かが言ったとしても、私は耳を貸さなかったでしょう。しかし、あなたは...あなたの功績で...{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}インペリウムの多くの権威です{/g}".{n}彼女は疑念に苛まれながら、しばらく黙ったままだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The barrel of the weapon in the woman's hands begins to visibly shake.{/n} "If someone else had said it, I wouldn't have listened. But you... with your merit... an authority to many in {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}". {n}She remains silent for a while, tormented by doubt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kadının elindeki silah, fark edilir şekilde titriyor.{/n} "Bunu başka biri söyleseydi dinlemezdim. Ama siz... Ve başarılarınız... {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'ta{/g} pek çok kişiden büyük saygı görüyorsunuz." {n}Şüpheleri tarafından yutulmuş bir hâlde bir süre sessiz kalıyor.{/n}

You command reverence from so many throughout the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}." {n}She falls silent for a time, consumed by her doubts.{/n}
